title: hippion verticillatum
intro: Hippion verticillatum, also known as sweet gale or bur marigold, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Hippion verticillatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Hippion verticillatum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
